display.purpose: Page-level h1. Dashboard title. Used once per page. Never in cards or list items.

headline.purpose: Section headings in panels. The reviewer name (text-4xl font-bold) is the intentional maximum — the hero element of the assignment card.

title.purpose: h3/h4 inside calm-section panels. Rarely needed; most section labels use Label instead.

body.purpose: All prose, descriptions, history item content, badge text, form helper text. System font for native rendering.

label.purpose: calm-kicker eyebrows, section header labels (HISTORY, AVAILABLE TEAMS). Uppercase + 0.22em tracking only at this size and role.

mono.purpose: Team slugs (/rmpe), PR URLs, identifiers, technical data. Never labels or prose.

shadows.name: shell-ambient
shadows.purpose: Top-level page shells: PageHeader, AssignmentCard wrapper. The most elevated atmospheric shadow.

shadows.name: section-ambient
shadows.purpose: Major content sections: FeedHistory, Events panel.

shadows.name: reviewer-box
shadows.purpose: The reviewer name display box only. The single shadow tied directly to the primary blue. Never used elsewhere.

motion.name: page-enter
motion.purpose: Primary page/section entrance animation. translateY 14px → 0 + opacity 0 → 1.

motion.name: page-enter-soft
motion.purpose: Softer entrance for AssignmentCard. translateY 20px → 0 + scale 0.985 → 1 + opacity.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: All interactive state changes: hover background fill, color shifts, border color. Never layout properties.

motion.name: ease-expo-out
motion.purpose: The only easing used for entrances and meaningful motion. No bounce, no elastic, no ease-in-out.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action trigger. Full-width as Assign PR; auto-width for create/navigation actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.52 0.19 258); color: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 10px 24px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.46 0.19 258); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.985 0.004 254), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.69 0.12 258 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.42 0.19 258); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary utility controls: header icon pill buttons, drawer triggers, export actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: oklch(0.985 0.004 254 / 0.7); color: oklch(0.205 0.01 258); padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 255 / 0.7); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.962 0.006 255 / 0.5); border-color: oklch(0.9 0.01 255); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.985 0.004 254), 0 0 0 4px oklch(0.69 0.12 258 / 0.5); }

components.name: Action Chip
components.description: Footer toggle chips: Multi-assignment, Force Assign, Urgent, Cross-team review. Height 40px, pill-shaped.
components.css: .ds-chip-action { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.205 0.01 258); background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 255 / 0.7); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-chip-action:hover { background: oklch(0.962 0.006 255 / 0.3); } .ds-chip-action[aria-pressed='true'] { background: oklch(0.52 0.19 258); color: oklch(1 0 0); border-color: oklch(0.52 0.19 258); }

components.name: Calm Shell
components.description: Top-level page panels. PageHeader and AssignmentCard wrapper. Never nest inside another calm-shell.
components.css: .ds-calm-shell { border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 255 / 0.7); background: oklch(0.985 0.004 254 / 0.82); box-shadow: 0 24px 80px -48px rgba(15,23,42,0.35); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); padding: 16px 24px; }

components.name: Calm Section
components.description: Major content sections: FeedHistory, Events list. Slightly softer shadow than calm-shell.
components.css: .ds-calm-section { border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 255 / 0.7); background: oklch(0.985 0.004 254 / 0.78); padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 20px 72px -52px rgba(15,23,42,0.35); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .ds-calm-section-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 255 / 0.6); padding-bottom: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }

components.name: Calm List
components.description: Feed list container. Rows inside use hover:bg-muted/30 — never individual cards per item.
components.html:
Pedro

25-04-2026, 2:41 p.m. · Assigned by Juan

Martin

25-04-2026, 2:40 p.m. · Assigned by Juan
components.css: .ds-calm-list { border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 255 / 0.6); border-radius: 16px; background: oklch(0.985 0.004 254 / 0.6); overflow: hidden; } .ds-calm-list-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 255 / 0.6); transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-calm-list-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-calm-list-item:hover { background: oklch(0.962 0.006 255 / 0.3); } .ds-list-name { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.205 0.01 258); line-height: 1.3; } .ds-list-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.48 0.02 256); }

components.name: Section Kicker
components.description: Eyebrow label. Used above page h1 (LA LISTA) and as section headers (HISTORY, AVAILABLE TEAMS).
components.css: .ds-kicker { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.52 0.19 258 / 0.85); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Exceptional-state-only badges on history items. Urgent (red), Cross-team (sky), Forced (amber), Skipped (blue). Never on regular/default items.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid; } .ds-badge-urgent { background: oklch(0.97 0.03 27); color: oklch(0.40 0.18 27); border-color: oklch(0.88 0.08 27); } .ds-badge-cross-team { background: oklch(0.96 0.04 220); color: oklch(0.44 0.14 220); border-color: oklch(0.86 0.08 220); }

narrative.overview:
La Lista is a tool that earns trust by getting out of the way. The design system is built on the conviction that a developer assigning PRs wants to think about the PR, not the interface. Every surface decision — the restrained blue, the tinted neutrals, the calm panel system — follows from that premise. The interface should feel like a well-made instrument: legible at a glance, no friction on the primary action, nothing decorative.

The palette is restrained OKLCH blue. Not 'developer tool blue' as a category reflex — the hue is a specific mid-blue (258°), used at controlled chroma (0.19), tinted into every neutral surface at near-zero chroma (0.004–0.012). The result is a surface that reads as near-white without being cold. Dark mode flips to a true dark (L 0.17, same hue), not a generic charcoal.

This system explicitly rejects: gradient text, hero-metric widgets, glassmorphism as decoration, side-stripe border accents, and any pattern that could be recognized as 'AI-generated developer tool' without seeing the product name. The reference is Linear: confident information hierarchy, every pixel purposeful, no ceremony.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained OKLCH blue across surfaces and accents, same hue family throughout
Space Grotesk for all headings and labels, tight −0.02em tracking
JetBrains Mono for slugs, code references, and data identifiers
A named surface system (calm-shell, calm-section, calm-panel) — not ad-hoc cards
Light and dark themes; system-default, not forced
Motion limited to state changes: opacity + translateY only, 560–720ms, exponential ease-out

rules.name: The One Hue Rule
rules.body: Every color in the system shares hue 255–260. No secondary accent hues are introduced. Pops of semantic color (red for urgent, amber for forced, sky for cross-team) are confined to status badges and never bleed into surfaces.

rules.name: The Opacity Layer Rule
rules.body: Surfaces use opacity variants (bg-background/82, bg-muted/28) over a shared hue-tinted background to create depth without explicit shadow stacking. The backdrop is always the same hue; only the opacity shifts.

rules.name: The Heading-Only Display Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk is restricted to headings, labels, and the calm-kicker eyebrow. It is never used for body copy, button labels, or data tables.

rules.name: The Reviewer Name Exception
rules.body: The current reviewer's name (text-4xl font-bold, primary color) is the single largest typographic element in the product. This is intentional — the whole tool exists to answer 'who reviews this?' That name is the answer. Nothing else in the UI competes with it.

rules.name: The Atmospheric Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are long, spread wide, and heavily blurred — never tight box shadows that create hard-edged depth. If a shadow is visible at 100% opacity in the final render, it is too strong.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: List items, table rows, chips, and badges are flat at rest. No shadow on hover — use bg-muted/30 background fill instead. Elevation is reserved for the page's major structural shells.

dos: Do use calm-shell, calm-section, calm-panel, calm-subtle-panel, and calm-list for all surface containers.
Do use OKLCH for all color values. Keep chroma ≤ 0.01 for neutral surfaces.
Do restrict Space Grotesk to headings and calm-kicker labels.
Do use JetBrains Mono exclusively for technical identifiers: slugs, PR URLs, repo paths.
Do apply rounded-full to all buttons and chips, without exception.
Do animate only opacity and transform. Use cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for page entrances.
Do mark exceptional history states (Urgent, Forced, Skipped, Cross-team) with badges. Not the default state.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on all animated elements.
donts: Don't use a border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Gradient text is forbidden.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. backdrop-blur-sm is used only inside named calm-surface utilities.
Don't build a hero-metric widget: big number + small label + icon in a bordered box.
Don't build identical card grids. Use calm-list for feeds, inline rows for teams.
Don't reach for a modal as the first affordance.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
Don't add a 'Regular' badge to normal history items — its absence is the signal.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (height, width, padding, margin).
Don't make the design feel like 'a developer tool' as a category: no dark-mode-by-default, no neon, no productivity-app beige.
